title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Searches for Missing Airman as Israel Launches Fresh Strikes on Tehran
summary_full: Iran downed an F-15E, the first U.S. warplane the country has shot down in the war. The episode presents challenges for the United States that would grow if the missing airman is taken prisoner.
summary_public: Iran downed an F-15E, the first U.S. warplane the country has shot down in the war. The episode presents challenges for the United States that would grow if the missing airman is taken prisoner.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel Launches Fresh Strikes on Tehran
